AMENDED DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Oct-02-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
John E Sharp (415-479-1645) for Plaintiff/ opposing party Russell S. Zappetini.
John Wiley (415-831-0500) for Defendant/Moving party MAN KIM.

The Court announces the tentative ruling, Hearing is held. Argued re: Fox and Notice of facts. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling as follows with modifications:

DEFENDANT MAN KIM'S AMENDED DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is OVERRULED, 20 days to answer. Plaintiff sufficiently alleges facts to support delayed discovery. The veracity of those allegations cannot be addressed on a demurrer. Order signed in open court. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: A. Pascual, Not Reported (D501)
